title: I Have No Need of Affection

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (…? Is that… a documentary about the URA?)

text_block_list.name: TV Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: …this year, her attempt at realizing her childhood dream ended in tears once again. Reporters flocked to the press area for comments after the race…

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: …here with her parents. Well, the race has been run and the results are set… how are you both feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl's Father
text_block_list.text: We've always supported her ambitions. She talked about wanting to shine in the big races since she was a little girl… and I think she always has, no matter the circumstance! I'm proud of her!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl's Mom
text_block_list.text: She always wanted to show us her best side… It makes me so happy to see the loving daughter she's grown into. For me it was enough to just see her run as she wanted…!

text_block_list.name: Gran Prix-Losing Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……Mom… Dad…! Thank you… I'll keep trying my best…!

text_block_list.name: TV Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: Her tear-stained face lights up at her parents' loving words. Perhaps this love will yet carry her to a G1 win in the future…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Preposterous.

text_block_list.name: Orphanage Worker
text_block_list.text:
We try to provide everything you would find at school here, 
but if there's anything else you want, you can tell us, okay? 
This is your home, after all.

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text: Okay… Thank you. I will study hard.

text_block_list.name: Young Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Weeh… I lost to that other girl… I'm sorry, papa… mama…

text_block_list.name: Young Horsegirl's Father
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! You were really great out there! 
Papa and mama are proud of you no matter what place 
you finish in!

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text: …Where can I find my "papa" or "mama"?

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text:
The teachers say we're all one big family… but… 
there's no "papa" or "mama"…

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text:
…Is that something to feel sad about? Should I feel lonely? 
I don't really know…

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text:
But I do know… that sometimes… it feels like something 
is pulling at my heart from the inside.

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text: As if there's a freezing hole growing larger there.

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text: But…

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
The winner of this URA-sponsored special event's lower 
elementary division is Admire Groove! She does it again…!

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text:
…I haven't lost to anyone. Not to those kids praised by 
their daddies. Not to the ones hugging their mommies.

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text:
…I see it now. It was so simple. 
It's because I won't lose…

text_block_list.name: Young Arve
text_block_list.text: That's why I don't need this papa or mama.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Accompanied by Parents
text_block_list.text: Hehehee♪ I'll do my best for both of you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I can just be strong on my own. It will all work out if I'm 
just strong enough… to close up that hole inside.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (…I will keep on winning. Even in the heat of the Twinkle Series.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Those coddled by love… spending their days sheltered 
and carefree… They will never claim victory over me!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (That's… Still in Love…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(One of the other students. Someone with no presence 
to speak of, unremarked by most…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (To me, however… every time I see her, I…!)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: First place goes to —̵—̸—̴—̶! After defeat at the —̷—̴̶—̵, Admire Groove has victory snatched from her again…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I keep having the same nightmare. 
In it, the same horsegirl invariably thwarts me…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(……! Just what is it about her? 
I feel like I'm about to lose my mind.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've… had enough. If she's the cause 
of these nightmares somehow…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, running together. Are you up for it?

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
…A-Ah, I'm… honored… that you would invite someone like me. 
Thank you… for allowing me this chance to learn from you. 
I will try to make the most of it…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, same here. Glad to have your company.

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: …! Haah… haaah…!!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (As usual, it's like she barely exists at all…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Struggling to even assert herself as part of the present. 
Intangible, negligible, as if her whole being is suppressing 
its own breath, fading into the background. Yet…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Victory… Glory… My whole way… of being.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: You take all of it from me in my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(I won't let you! Even if they are just nightmares, 
defeat is unacceptable…!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(And this nightmare ends today…! I will defeat you, 
utterly and completely, and drive you from my ——)
THERE… YOU… ARE…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (…!? What…? I-I can't… move right!?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (What's more, this feeling…!? Who am I… running with…?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Ghh… haaa…… Ghhaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah…!!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Ghahh… haah…! Haahh… hahh…! Haah… haaah…!

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
…Ah… I-I… I'm terribly sorry… if I showed 
any immodest behavior during our race…

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
I-If you don't mind, however, I would… like to run 
with you again some… time. …E-Excuse me…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
……Why? What in the world just happened…? 
Wasn't I going to expel this nightmare by winning…?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
So why… do I…? Whatever is this… 
unsettling feeling in my chest?!
